title: Add URV AI Chat to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: New bloom: URV AI Chat
gist.blurb: URV AI Chat just sprouted in our community greenhouse! Jump in to chat with diverse LLMs, craft custom characters, and generate images—all powered by the hive.
gist.summary: Added URV AI Chat to the community apps showcase, highlighting its features for diverse LLM access, character creation, and image generation.
gist.impact: Community members can now discover and explore URV AI Chat directly from the Pollinations app directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a new chat application to the community 'greenhouse' (apps directory). The visual should feature Polly the bee in a greenhouse setting, tending to a new 'chat' plant, symbolizing the growth of the community ecosystem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing chat-bubble shaped flower in a lush digital greenhouse. A chunky retro robot with a monitor head stands nearby, holding a small watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing chat-bubble shaped flower in a lush digital greenhouse. A chunky retro robot with a monitor head stands nearby, holding a small watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background.
